title: Ban Menu
description: Ban menu plugin for faster banning.
body:
Ban Menu is a Paper and Purpur plugin made for easier banning and unbanning.
You simply type /ban when you want to ban. And if you want to unban you type /unban.

When you type /ban here is what will show:
![Ban Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b644c41d69bffe7c3a17e59f821f7c8d5e9c7268.png)

The heads are all the online players (except you).
When you click on someone, they will be banned.
The red glass in the corner is a quick way to go to unban menu.

When you type /unban here is what will show:
![Unban Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/958508e8d1568f5108b4c64bd66c4e41c69a8e0f.png)

The heads here are all the banned players.
When you click on someone, they will be unbanned.
The green glass in the corner is a quick way to go to ban menu.
